title: Voter
description: Experience the election process from the perspective of a citizen.
tasks: Go to the polling booth with valid ID
Cast vote via EVM and verify VVPAT

title: Candidate
description: See what it takes to run for an office.
tasks: Campaign within the ECI expenditure limits
Appoint polling agents for counting day

title: Polling Officer
description: Understand the responsibilities of conducting a free and fair election.
tasks: Operate the Control Unit of the EVM
